message:
fix(remote): eviction saga timestamps, idempotency injective framing, and replay bundle

eviction_saga:
- Pass real timestamp_ms into record_transition() instead of using a
  placeholder 0 — transition records now carry the actual time of the
  phase change, enabling accurate replay and audit analysis
- Extended saga lifecycle with richer transition metadata

idempotency:
- Replace delimiter-separated key derivation (domain || 0x1F || name ||
  0x1F || epoch || 0x1F || bytes) with length-prefixed framing
  (len_be_u64 || domain || len_be_u64 || name || epoch_be_u64 ||
  len_be_u64 || bytes) — the old scheme was vulnerable to delimiter
  injection when computation_name or request_bytes contained 0x1F
- Add domain derivation tag for additional separation
- Enhanced key derivation tests

remote_bulkhead:
- Bulkhead policy refinements and capacity tracking improvements

replay_bundle:
- Extended replay bundle with richer artifact metadata and improved
  deterministic bundle construction

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
